summary: Complete verification of all 5 CelebrateContentModal critical fixes. All 5 issues from previous iteration now resolved and working correctly.

test_results.1_birthday_cakes_shows_real_tdb_cakes: ✅ PASS - Birthday Cakes tab shows 'cakes' category (Kawaii Woofy Cake, Dog Birthday Cake Hamper w/ Toy) - NOT celebration packages. 'Labrador Birthday Celebration Box' NOT found. Count: 60 items.
test_results.2_miras_picks_breed_aware_indie_mojo: ✅ PASS - Mira's Picks for Indie dog Mojo shows top cakes (generic, not Labrador products). Contains 'Kawaii' cakes but NO 'Labrador Birthday Celebration Box'. Count: 24 items.
test_results.3_bundle_detail_sheet_x_close_button: ✅ PASS - data-testid='bundle-detail-close' X button found on BundleDetailSheet. Button clickable and closes sheet.
test_results.4_bundle_detail_image_object_contain: ✅ PASS - Bundle image uses objectFit='contain' (Cloudinary images). No image cropping.
test_results.5_soul_picks_opens_productcard_modal: ✅ PASS - Clicking product in Soul Picks opens ProductCard modal with X button, NOT BundleDetailSheet. hasBundleClose=False confirmed.
test_results.6_footer_mira_whisper_not_continue_shopp: ✅ PASS - Footer shows Mira whisper on left: '🎂 Cake explored — Mojo's birthday is taking shape' (birthday-cakes), '✨ Soul picks — made just for Mojo' (soul-picks), '🌟 Mira curated these just for Mojo' (miras-picks). NO 'Continue Shopping' anywhere.
test_results.7_footer_cta_build_birthday_plan: ✅ PASS - data-testid='celebrate-modal-cta' button shows 'Build Mojo's Birthday Plan →' (birthday-cakes), 'Build Mojo's Soul Box →' (soul-picks), 'Start Mojo's Celebration →' (miras-picks).
test_results.8_11_categories_in_strip: ✅ PASS - All 11 categories confirmed: birthday-cakes, breed-cakes, pupcakes, desi-treats, frozen-treats, hampers, bundles, party, nut-butters, soul-picks, miras-picks.
test_results.9_desktop_modal_centered: ✅ PASS - center_x=640.0 on 1280px viewport (diff=0.0px from expected 640). Perfect centering.
test_results.soul_picks_indie_products: ✅ PASS - Soul Picks shows 'Made for Mojo — Indie' with Indie Bandana, Indie Lover Mug, Indie Keychain, Indie Portrait Frame, Indie Tote Bag (breed-aware).
test_results.bundles_modal_6_items: ✅ PASS - 6 bundle cards loaded: First Birthday Special, Premium Bark-day Bash, Pawty Essentials, Senior Celebration, Adoption Anniversary, New Puppy Welcome.
test_results.category_api_cakes_111_products: ✅ PASS - /api/products?category=cakes returns 111 products (confirmed via API). CATEGORY_API maps birthday-cakes → cakes (not celebration).

backend_api_verification.cakes_category: 111 products (Dog Birthday Cake Hamper, Kawaii Woofy Cake, etc.) ✅
backend_api_verification.celebration_category: 106 products (Labrador Birthday Celebration Box etc - NOT shown in Birthday Cakes) ✅

critical_code_review_comments: All 5 critical fixes verified working correctly.
Mira's Picks lines 385-399: breed-filtered from 'cakes' category, falls back to top 24 cakes for Indie (no breed match = shows top cakes, NOT Labrador products) ✅
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 CelebrateContentModal fixes verified working: 1) Birthday Cakes→cakes category (111 products, real TDB cakes), 2) Mira's Picks breed-aware (Indie dog shows non-Labrador cakes), 3) BundleDetailSheet has X close button (data-testid='bundle-detail-close'), 4) Bundle image uses objectFit=contain, 5) Soul Picks opens ProductCard modal not BundleDetailSheet. Footer: Mira whisper + CTA button (not 'Continue Shopping'). 11 categories in strip. Desktop modal centered (0.0px diff).
rca_of_issue: N/A - All issues from iteration 104 have been successfully fixed.
